title: Love in Aisle Five
author: Barış Kısır
short_description: A meticulous grocery store manager and a chaos-agent florist collide over a misplaced delivery of organic kale.
long_description: Nora Finch runs her grocery store like a naval vessel: everything in its place, every shelf faced, every expiration date logged. Leo Morelli runs his flower delivery service like a beautiful disaster: orders lost, vans double-parked, bouquets arriving at the wrong addresses. When a delivery of organic kale arrives at Leo's shop instead of Nora's loading dock, the resulting argument is witnessed by three customers, a delivery driver, and a parrot. Love in Aisle Five is a warm, witty romantic comedy about two people who are absolutely wrong for each other on paper and absolutely right everywhere that matters.
